mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS value before decision date was 421147.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns, with walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment crosses above an elevated threshold and is rising, equity investors price weaker income growth and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 7.5% and its 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest available UNRATE value before decision date was 7.6
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing below 0.25% identifies an aggressive easing regime that lowers discount rates and supports risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS value before decision date was 0.11
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns following FEDFUNDS crossings below 0.25% are not higher than baseline returns or if the conditional hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below its 6-month moving average signals weakening output and profit pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average after being above it
evidence_refs: fact:latest available INDPRO value before decision date was 98.6709
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crossings are followed by nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if downside signals do not underperform upside signals.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains combined with rising retail sales and falling unemployment identify broad income-led demand acceleration, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS and RSAFS 3-month changes are positive while UNRATE 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal does not outperform any single proxy signal over 5 trading days or if its average forward return is below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 900 thousand for multiple months signal weak interest-sensitive demand and future construction drag, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 900 for two consecutive monthly observations
evidence_refs: fact:latest available HOUST value before decision date was 853.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below 900 for two months is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration combined with rising policy rates raises discount rates and compresses equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 3% while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is positive
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with inflation pressure
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-and-rate signal has positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns or fails to underperform periods with inflation acceleration alone.

mechanism_narrative: A real GDP growth crossing below zero signals aggregate demand contraction and declining earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarter-over-quarter growth crosses below 0%
evidence_refs: fact:latest available GDPC1 value before decision date was 13746.2
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 growth crossings do not precede below-average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if triggered returns are positive in more than 60% of cases.
